hero.title: Hush Gallery - Hide Photos & Videos
hero.subtitle: Private Photo Gallery
hero.description: A secure and private photo gallery application that allows you to keep your personal photos safe and organized. With advanced privacy features and intuitive design, it's the perfect solution for protecting your memories.
hero.structuredDataDescription: Hush Gallery — private photo and video vault for iOS and Android. Hide media from WhatsApp and Photos via Share, organize with tags, PIN/biometric App Lock (Premium), optional iCloud/Google Drive backup. Package com.zuki.apps.hushGallery by Zuki Apps.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.description: Your photos are stored securely with advanced encryption
items: Local-first storage in app's private directory

storage.title: Secure Storage
storage.description: All media stored locally with optional cloud sync

organization.title: Organized Collections
organization.description: Manage your photos and videos efficiently

security.title: App Lock
security.description: Protect your gallery with multiple security options

backup.title: Cloud Backup
backup.description: Optional encrypted cloud backup for your media

businessUse.title: 💼 Perfect for Business Use
businessUse.description: Are you a business owner who uses your phone for both work and personal life? Hush Gallery is the perfect solution to keep your business photos separate from your personal ones.

benefits.title: Business Benefits
items: Create dedicated tags for product photos, client documents, marketing materials, team photos, and financial documents
Never worry about accidentally showing personal photos during a business presentation
Keep work files separate from family memories
Access business photos during meetings without exposing personal content
Share business photos with colleagues without showing personal files

example.title: 🎯 Real-World Example
example.description: You run a small business and use your phone for everything. You take photos of products, receipts, client meetings, and also personal family photos. With Hush Gallery, you can:
items: Create a "Business" tag for all work-related photos
Create a "Personal" tag for family photos
Keep them completely separate and secure
Access business photos during meetings without exposing personal content
Share business photos with colleagues without showing personal files

steps.title: Select Photos
steps.description: Select photos from any app (Gallery, WhatsApp, etc.)

steps.title: Auto-Hide & Encrypt
steps.description: Your photos are automatically hidden and encrypted

steps.title: Organize with Tags
steps.description: Create tags to organize (Business, Personal, Family, etc.)

steps.title: Secure Access
steps.description: Access with PIN or biometric authentication

languages.title: 🌍 Multi-Language Support
languages.description: Hush Gallery supports 12+ languages including English, עברית, Русский, العربية, Français, Italiano, Español, Português, 中文（简体）, Deutsch, 日本語, 한국어, and more.

privacyGuarantee.title: 🔒 Privacy Guarantee
privacyGuarantee.description: Your privacy is our top priority. All files are stored securely in the app's private directory, we never access your files, and your data is never sold to third parties. Encryption feature coming soon.

premium.title: Premium Features
premium.description: Unlock advanced features with a one-time purchase

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: Please read these Terms of Use carefully before using Hush Gallery. By accessing or using our service, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our service.

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: These Terms of Use ("Terms") govern your access to and use of Hush Gallery ("Service", "App", "we", "us", or "our"), a private photo gallery application operated by Zuki Apps ("Company"). By downloading, installing, accessing, or using the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms and our Privacy Policy.
section1.content2: If you are using the Service on behalf of an organization, you represent and warrant that you have the authority to bind that organization to these Terms.

section2.title: 2. Description of Service
section2.content: Hush Gallery is a mobile application that allows users to store, organize, and manage photos and videos privately. The Service includes:
items: App lock with PIN/password and biometric authentication
Premium features (as described in the app)

section19.title: 19. Contact Information
section19.content: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us:

privacy.title: Privacy Policy

section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
section1.content: Hush Gallery is designed with privacy as a core principle. We collect minimal information necessary to provide the service. We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account (if using cloud backup), use our services, or contact us for support.

section2.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
section2.content: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services. Your photos and videos are stored locally on your device by default. If you choose to use cloud backup, your media is encrypted client-side before being stored.

section3.title: 3. Information Sharing
section3.content: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information or media to third parties without your consent, except as described in this policy. Your photos and videos remain private and are only accessible to you.

section4.title: 4. Data Security
section4.content: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information and media. All cloud backups are encrypted client-side before transmission. Local storage uses the app's private directory, which is not accessible by other apps.

section5.title: 5. Your Rights
section5.content: You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information and media at any time. You can delete your account and all associated data through the app settings. You may also opt out of cloud backup at any time.

section6.title: 6. Photo and Video Library Access
section6.content: Hush Gallery requires access to your device's photo library to allow you to import photos and videos. We only access your media when you explicitly choose to import it. All imported media is stored in the app's private directory and is not shared with third parties.

section8.title: 8. Contact Us
section8.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

privacy.metaDescription: Hush Gallery 隐私政策 — 我们如何处理您在 iOS 和 Android 上的数据。

deleteAccount.title: Delete Hush Gallery Account
deleteAccount.intro: If you wish to delete your account and all associated data, please follow the steps below. This process is permanent and cannot be undone.

warning.title: ⚠️ Important Warning
warning.content: Account deletion is a permanent action and cannot be undone. All data associated with your account will be permanently deleted, including photos, videos, folders, and settings.

steps.title: Account Deletion Instructions
steps.step1: Open the Hush Gallery app on your device
steps.step2: Log in to your account (if you haven't already)
steps.step3: Navigate to Settings (usually accessible from the main menu or profile)
steps.step4: Scroll down until you find the "Delete Account" or "Account Settings" option
steps.step5: Tap the "Delete Account" button and read the warning message carefully
steps.step6: Confirm the deletion - the account and all data will be permanently deleted

data.title: Data That Will Be Deleted
data.intro: When you delete your account, the following data will be permanently deleted:
data.item1: Account information: name, email address, user ID (if using cloud backup)
data.item2: Photos and videos: all media stored in the app
data.item3: Folders and collections: all organized folders and albums
data.item4: Settings and preferences: app settings, PIN/password, biometric settings
data.item5: Cloud backup data: all encrypted backup data (if cloud backup was enabled)
data.item6: Metadata: all metadata associated with your media
data.item7: Local storage: all data stored in the app's private directory

partialDelete.title: Deleting Some Data (Without Deleting the Account)
partialDelete.intro: If you wish to delete only some data without deleting the account, you can:
partialDelete.item1: Delete individual photos/videos: Open the media → Delete option
partialDelete.item2: Delete folders: Open folder → Delete folder option
partialDelete.item3: Clear app data: Settings → Clear all data (keeps account)
partialDelete.item4: Disable cloud backup: Settings → Disable cloud backup (removes cloud data but keeps local data)

retention.title: Retention Period
retention.content: After account deletion, data will be deleted from our servers within 30 days. During this period, data may be retained in backups, but will not be accessible through the app. Local data on your device will be deleted immediately when you delete the account through the app.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions or issues with account deletion, please contact us:

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers for users and search assistants about Hush Gallery features, privacy, and troubleshooting.

items.question: Hush Gallery是什么？
items.answer: Hush Gallery 是iOS 和Android 的私人照片和视频库。媒体存储在应用程序的私人存储中（与公共照片应用程序分开），使用标签进行组织，使用可选的 Premium 应用程序锁（PIN/生物识别）进行保护，并可选择备份到 iCloud (iOS) 或 Google Drive (Android)。包：com.zuki.apps.hushGallery。

items.question: 如何将照片和视频导入Hush Gallery？
items.answer: 打开 Hush Gallery 并点击 +（添加）按钮。选择从图库导入、拍照或拍摄视频。从设备库中选择一项或多项。导入后，您可以选择从公共图库中删除原件。您还可以使用共享 → Hush Gallery 直接从 WhatsApp、消息、照片或其他应用程序进行共享。

items.question: 如何在 iPhone 上分享到Hush Gallery？
items.answer: 在照片、WhatsApp或任何应用程序中：选择媒体 → 共享 → Hush Gallery。 iOS 共享扩展将文件复制到安全的应用程序存储并打开 Hush Gallery。共享后首次启动时，接受隐私声明（如果显示），然后确认导入。系统可能会询问您是否从照片库中删除原件。

items.question: 分享到Hush Gallery如何在Android上发挥作用？
items.answer: 在任何应用程序中选择照片或视频 → 分享 → Hush Gallery。该应用程序接收共享文件并将其导入私人存储中。出现提示时授予照片访问权限。可选：导入后通过应用程序内对话框或设置→删除→自动删除源文件删除原始文件。

items.question: 导入后我可以从公共图库中删除原件吗？
items.answer: 是的。每次导入后，Hush Gallery可以询问：删除照片库中的原始文件吗？启用设置→删除→自动删除源文件以跳过提示。删除时使用 iOS 上的照片库资产 ID（如果可用）；如果识别失败，为了安全，系统会要求您手动删除。

items.question: 标签在 Hush Gallery 中如何工作？
items.answer: 从标签栏创建自定义标签（管理标签）。使用“全部”、“未标记”或任何标记来过滤网格。在选择模式下，一次将标签分配给多个项目。免费用户：最多 5 个标签。 Premium：无限标签。在编辑模式下重新排序标签。

items.question: 免费和Premium有什么区别？
items.answer: 免费：本地私人画廊、导入/导出、最多 5 个标签、横幅广告。 Premium（一次性购买）：删除所有广告、无限标签、应用程序锁定（PIN/生物识别/自动锁定）、云备份和未来的premium功能。免费套餐 24 小时无广告打扰地观看激励广告。

items.question: 如何设置应用锁？
items.answer: 需要Premium。进入设置 → 安全 → 应用程序锁定。设置 4 位或 6 位 PIN 码，并可选择启用 Face ID/Touch ID/指纹。配置自动锁定超时（立即、1、5 或 15 分钟）。恢复 PIN 码需要经过验证的电子邮件。

items.question: 我忘记了 PIN 码。如何恢复访问权限？
items.answer: 在锁定屏幕上点击忘记 PIN 码。使用用于恢复的经过验证的电子邮件登录，或者从加密的云备份中恢复您的 PIN（如果启用）。清除锁定设置会删除 PIN，但不会删除您的媒体。

items.question: 云备份如何工作？
items.answer: Premium特征。设置 → 备份 → 立即备份或启用自动备份。 iOS 使用 iCloud； Android 使用 Google 云端硬盘。从“设置”或在入职期间在新设备上恢复。在备份/恢复期间保持应用程序打开。

items.question: 我的媒体是否已加密？
items.answer: 媒体存储在应用程序的私有目录中，其他应用程序无法访问。本地文件和云备份的客户端加密即将在“设置”中推出。启用后，云备份会上传到您自己的 iCloud/Google 帐户。

items.question: 我的照片存储在哪里？其他应用程序可以看到它们吗？
items.answer: 导入的文件位于您设备上 Hush Gallery 的私人应用程序存储中，而不是位于公共相机胶卷中，除非您将其导出。如果没有解锁 PIN/生物识别 (Premium)，其他应用程序无法浏览保管库。

items.question: 如何将照片导出回我的设备图库？
items.answer: 打开照片/视频 → 导出到图库，或在选择模式下选择多个项目 → 导出。在支持的情况下会保留元数据。移至图库导出并可选择从 Hush Gallery 中删除副本。

items.question: 滑动删除是如何工作的？
items.answer: 向左滑动缩略图即可删除。带有撤消功能的快捷信息栏会出现 5 秒。确认从Hush Gallery永久删除（不是从公共画廊，除非您使用删除原始文件导入）。

items.question: Hush Gallery支持哪些语言？
items.answer: 12 种以上语言，包括英语、希伯来语、阿拉伯语、德语、西班牙语、法语、意大利语、葡萄牙语、俄语、日语、韩语和中文。更改设置 → 语言。

items.question: 首次启动隐私声明是什么？
items.answer: 首次打开时，Hush Gallery 会显示隐私声明，说明媒体保留在您的设备上并且更改可能是永久性的。接受后点击继续，或立即点击推迟（下次启动时再次显示）。

items.question: 如何删除我的帐户？
items.answer: 设置 → 帐户 → 删除帐户。请参阅 https://zukiapps.com/hush-gallery/delete-account 了解分步说明。

items.question: 如果我卸载该应用程序会发生什么？
items.answer: 除非您先导出文件，否则本地私有存储将随应用程序一起删除。如果启用了云备份，请重新安装、登录并使用从备份还原。

items.question: Hush Gallery 会显示广告吗？
items.answer: 免费套餐显示横幅广告和偶尔的插页式广告。 Premium 删除所有广告。免费用户可以24小时观看激励广告，无广告。

items.question: 如何联系支持人员？
items.answer: Email zuki.apps.dev@gmail.com or visit https://zukiapps.com/hush-gallery/support. Privacy: https://zukiapps.com/hush-gallery/privacy. Terms: https://zukiapps.com/hush-gallery/terms.

items.question: Zuki Apps 可以访问我的照片吗？
items.answer: 否。 Hush Gallery 将媒体本地存储在设备上的私人应用程序存储中。除非您明确启用云备份到您自己的 iCloud 或 Google Drive 帐户，否则我们不会上传或访问您的文件。

items.question: 我可以在不登录的情况下使用Hush Gallery吗？
items.answer: 是的。图库、导入、标签和导出可以离线工作，无需帐户。仅云备份和通过备份恢复 PIN 码时需要登录。

items.question: 什么是“全部”和“未标记”过滤器？
items.answer: 全部显示您保管库中的每个项目。未标记仅显示未分配自定义标签的项目。定制标签芯片一次过滤一个标签。

items.question: 如何对画廊进行排序？
items.answer: 点击图库应用栏中的排序图标 (⇅)。选择日期、文件大小、导入日期、名称或媒体类型（首先是照片还是视频）。

items.question: 导入会从我的相机胶卷中删除照片吗？
items.answer: 默认情况下，将副本文件导入到Hush Gallery；原件会保留在照片中，除非您在提供时选择删除原件或自行删除它们。

items.question: 需要云备份吗？
items.answer: 不。备份是可选的。您的保管库完全在设备上运行，无需备份或帐户。

items.question: 备份中包含什么？
items.answer: 备份包括媒体文件和标签等元数据。平台行为取决于 iCloud (iOS) 或 Google Drive (Android) 以及您的登录帐户。

items.question: 如何恢复Premium购买？
items.answer: 打开Premium→恢复购买。使用最初购买时使用的同一 Apple ID 或 Google Play 帐户。

items.question: 为什么当我返回时应用程序要求我输入 PIN 码？
items.answer: 当您将应用程序置于后台或选择的自动锁定超时后，应用程序锁定会重新锁定。这可以防止未经授权访问您的保管库。

items.question: 缩略图看起来是空的或损坏的 - 我该怎么办？
items.answer: 强制退出并重新打开Hush Gallery。如果文件被移动到应用程序之外，元数据可能会过时 - 如果需要，请重新导入媒体。

items.question: 备份失败 — 如何修复？
items.answer: 检查 Wi‑Fi 或蜂窝数据，确认您已登录，验证云存储空间，并确保您的帐户的 Premium/备份资格。

items.question: 共享扩展导入未显示
items.answer: 手动打开Hush Gallery；待处理的共享导入在启动时运行。如果共享表报告错误，请重试从照片共享。

support.title: 支持和帮助
support.subtitle: 我们随时为您提供帮助！查找常见问题的答案或直接联系我们。

contact.title: 联系我们
contact.description: 有问题或需要帮助吗？请发送电子邮件给我们，我们会尽快回复您。

privacy.title: 隐私政策
privacy.description: 了解我们如何保护您的数据

terms.title: 服务条款
terms.description: 阅读我们的条款和条件

additionalHelp.title: 需要更多帮助？
additionalHelp.description: 如果您找不到您要找的答案，或者遇到技术问题，请随时与我们联系。我们随时为您提供帮助，通常会在24-48小时内回复。

q1.question: 如何将照片和视频导入到Hush Gallery？
q1.answer: 要导入媒体，请打开应用程序并点击'+'或'导入'按钮。您可以从设备的图库中选择照片和视频。导入的媒体将安全地存储在应用程序的私有目录中，其他应用程序无法访问。

q2.question: 云备份如何工作？
q2.answer: 云备份是一项可选的Premium功能。启用后，您的照片和视频在上传到iCloud（iOS）或Google Drive（Android）之前会在您的设备上加密。加密发生在客户端，这意味着我们无法访问您的媒体。您可以随时在设置中启用或禁用云备份。

q3.question: 如何设置应用锁定？
q3.answer: 转到设置 → 安全 → 应用锁定。您可以设置PIN、密码或启用生物识别身份验证（Face ID/Touch ID）。应用程序将在您可以在设置中配置的非活动时间段后自动锁定。

q4.question: 如何删除我的账户？
q4.answer: 要删除您的账户，请转到设置 → 账户 → 删除账户。请注意，账户删除是永久性的，无法撤销。您的所有数据，包括照片、视频、文件夹和设置，将被永久删除。有关详细说明，请访问我们的删除账户页面。

q5.question: 我可以在没有云备份的情况下使用Hush Gallery吗？
q5.answer: 是的！Hush Gallery完全离线工作。默认情况下，您的所有照片和视频都本地存储在您的设备上。云备份是可选的，只有在您选择使用它时才会启用。即使没有云备份，您的媒体也保持私密和安全。

q6.question: 如果我卸载应用程序，我的照片会怎样？
q6.answer: 如果您在删除账户之前卸载应用程序，您的本地数据将被删除。如果您启用了云备份，可以通过重新安装应用程序并使用同一账户登录来恢复数据。如果您没有启用云备份，我们建议在卸载之前导出重要照片。

tips.title: Tips & tricks
tips.subtitle: Get the most from your private gallery.

items.title: Hide from WhatsApp fast
items.description: Long-press a photo in WhatsApp → Share → Hush Gallery. Faster than saving to Camera Roll first.

items.title: Use tags early
items.description: Create tags when you import so filtering stays easy as your vault grows.

items.title: Short auto-lock
items.description: Set App Lock to Immediately or 1 minute if you hand your phone to others often.

items.title: Backup before a new phone
items.description: Run Backup Now before replacing your device; restore after signing in on the new install.

items.title: Export without losing vault copy
items.description: Export to Gallery copies files out; originals remain in Hush Gallery until you delete them.

items.title: Restore purchases
items.description: Reinstalled? Premium → Restore purchases with the same store account.

items.title: 12 languages + RTL
items.description: Settings → Language includes Hebrew and Arabic with full RTL layout support.

items.title: Send feedback in-app
items.description: Settings → About → Send feedback, or email zuki.apps.dev@gmail.com before leaving a store review.
